etymology.text: Borrowed from Middle Persian [Book Pahlavi needed] (dstkrt' /⁠dastagird, dastigird⁠/, “estate”). Akin to Parthian 𐭃𐭎𐭕𐭊𐭓𐭕 (dstkrt /⁠dastgird⁠/), Old Armenian դաստակերտ (dastakert), Jewish Babylonian Aramaic דִּיסְקַרְתּא (disqartā) / דִּסְקַרְתּא (disqartā), Classical Syriac ܕܰܣܬܩܰܪܬܳܐ (dastqartā) / ܕܰܣܩܰܪܬܳܐ (dasqartā), all of equal meaning. Doublet of دَسْتَجِرْد (dastajird).
